name: pair-agent
tagline: Pairs a remote AI agent with your browser, allowing the agent to browse the web using your local browser instance.
verdict: This skill enables remote AI agents to control your browser. It includes robust setup instructions for various agents and handles both local and remote connections, including ngrok setup. The skill clearly defines access levels and provides revocation mechanisms. It also includes extensive preamble and telemetry scripts, which are well-documented.

highlights.summary: Downloads bun install script and pipes it to bash without inspection.
SKILL.md contains a very long preamble (over 200 lines) that could be moved to a separate reference file.
SKILL.md is 700+ lines, exceeding the recommended 500-line budget.
